examples: She opened the tie box and looked at her purchase. It was silk, with maroon stripes.
He was slapping his tambourine against his maroon wide-wale corduroys.
A travel mug, in beautiful maroon.
Letter size a green voucher, oversize a yellow voucher, parcel size a maroon voucher.
There were pleated skirts, collared shirts and cropped jackets in burgundy, maroon and purple.
